amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 60 — paragraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 60 — paragraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. The Commission shall, in collaboration with the Member States, set up and maintain a EU database containing information referred to in paragraph 2 concerning high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2) which are registered in accordance with Article 51.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1. The Commission shall, in collaboration with the Member States, set up and maintain a public EU database containing information referred to in paragraphs 2 and 2a concerning high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6 (2) which are registered in accordance with Article 51.
commission_text: 1. The Commission shall, in collaboration with the Member States, set up and maintain a EU database containing information referred to in paragraph 2 concerning high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2) which are registered in accordance with Article 51.
parliament_text: 1. The Commission shall, in collaboration with the Member States, set up and maintain a public EU database containing information referred to in paragraphs 2 and 2a concerning high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6 (2) which are registered in accordance with Article 51.
